Plot term-level enrichment results

plot_terms.Rd

Plot term-level enrichment results

Usage

plot_terms(x, type = c("dot", "bar", "volcano", "ridge"), top_n = 20)

Arguments

x

An EnrichRes object.

type

Plot type: "dot", "bar", "volcano", or "ridge".

top_n

Number of top terms to display for non-volcano views.

Value

A ggplot2 object.

On this page
